name: nr13-sistema
description: Sistema de Gestão de Inspeções NR-13 — NestJS + Next.js + SQLite

scripts.setup:
npm run install:all && echo '
✅ Dependências instaladas. Rode: npm run dev'
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
